title: diasperus roxburghii
intro: Diasperus roxburghii, also known as the Roxburgh's Diasperus, is a plant species native to the Himalayas, classified under the family Rutaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Diasperus roxburghii include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Diasperus roxburghii include infusions, decoctions, and powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or added to food products.
